about.title: About Us | Lamset Beauty
about.description: Learn about Lamset Beauty's story and our vision for providing the best natural beauty and skincare products.
about.seoKeywords: about Lamset Beauty, about the store, beauty products, cosmetics
about.storyText1: Lamset Beauty started from a deep passion for the world of beauty and luxury care. We are a specialized store offering high-quality beauty products, from authentic cosmetics to premium care products.
about.storyText2: We believe that true beauty comes from distinguished care, which is why we carefully select each product to ensure the best experience for our valued customers.
about.naturalProductsDesc: All our products are made from pure natural ingredients, without any harmful chemicals or artificial preservatives.
about.guaranteedQualityDesc: We carefully select our products and guarantee the highest quality and safety standards for your skin and hair.
about.personalCareDesc: We care about every customer and strive to provide the best shopping experience and exceptional customer service.
about.growingCommunityDesc: Join thousands of satisfied customers who have chosen nature as their path to self-care.
about.ourVisionText: We aspire to be the first choice in Saudi Arabia for natural care products, and we aim to spread the culture of healthy natural beauty in every home.
about.ourJourney: Our Journey in the World of Natural Beauty

faq.title: FAQ | Lamset Beauty
faq.description: Answers to the most common questions about shopping, shipping, and returns at Lamset Beauty.
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions
faq.seoDesc: Questions and answers about Lamset Beauty natural products: shampoo bar, vitamin C serum, shipping methods, returns and exchanges, payment methods.
faq.seoKeywords: FAQ Lamset Beauty, natural products inquiries, return policy, shipping and delivery, payment methods, safe natural products
faq.notFoundAnswer: Didn't find an answer to your question?
faq.a1: Lamset Beauty is a store specializing in natural care products. We offer natural soaps, shampoos, and cosmetics free from harmful chemicals, made from 100% natural ingredients.
faq.q2: Are the products safe for sensitive skin?
faq.a2: Yes, all our products are natural and free from harsh chemicals, making them suitable for sensitive skin. However, we always recommend performing a simple patch test before full use.
faq.a3: We deliver your orders within 2-5 business days within Saudi Arabia. A tracking number will be sent via email once your order is shipped.
faq.a4: We accept payment via credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard), Apple Pay, Google Pay, and American Express. All payments are fully secure and encrypted.
faq.q5: Can I return or exchange a product?
faq.a5: Yes, you can return unused products within 14 days of receipt. Please review the return policy for more details.
faq.q6: How do I preserve natural products?
faq.a6: To maintain the quality of natural products, store them in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Use natural soaps within 6-12 months of opening.
faq.q7: Are the products suitable for children?
faq.a7: Yes, most of our natural products are suitable for children. However, please read each product description carefully and make sure it is appropriate for your child's age.
faq.q8: Do you ship outside Saudi Arabia?
faq.a8: Currently, we only ship within Saudi Arabia. We are working on expanding our services to include Gulf countries soon.
faq.q9: How can I track my order?
faq.a9: A tracking number will be sent to your email once your order is shipped. You can use this number to track your shipment through the shipping company's website.
faq.a10: We offer special deals and free gifts from time to time. Follow us on social media to learn about the latest offers and available gifts.

testimonials.t1Text: Amazing and 100% natural products. I tried the bar shampoo and the result was incredible. My hair became softer and more vibrant.
testimonials.t2Text: Fast shipping and excellent packaging. Natural products from Lamset Beauty completely changed my hair care routine.
testimonials.t3Text: The best store for natural products in Saudi Arabia. High quality and reasonable prices, I highly recommend it.
